title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Sri Chaitanya - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Sri Chaitanya - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Sri Chaitanya family as a Curriculum Developer in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Sri Chaitanya:
Sri Chaitanya is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
